caption_text:
It’s pretty much that simple - 

This post is made so you can forward it to the person who you love ❤️ who is scared to start and yet you know they want to … so……. Bad

So many of you need to hear this this morning ☀️ … the amount of dwelling and looking backwards that’s going on in the world 🌍 is troubling to say the least. My friends … everyone has scars from life. Missteps, setbacks, challenges, it’s called life … use this post to change your perspective.. because it’s all u got ❤️

#garyvee #advice #perspective

caption_text:
Fear is being weaponized against you … and it breaks my heart 💔 … please my friends .. stop 🛑 letting “them” scare u

#fear #motivation #inspiration

Some Tuesday morning ☀️ juice 🥤 …. Enough …. ENOUGH!!! A shocking % of people here are living for other people’s opinions .. often people they don’t know or even like

#garyvee #advice #motivation

caption_text:
1st PLEASE REPLY -> chrome to get an auto dm with a link to the blog post about the new drop and the URL for tomorrow’s pre-sale raffle!

This product is going to sell out very quickly on June 10th when it droops and so getting in on this pre-sale raffle is one of the few ways to get some of the product, if you haven’t been following along, @veefriendscards have been getting very collectible and the 2025 version of this set is on fire on EBAY - go check completed and sold items under “veefriends” to see the heat. If you have any questions on VF cards pls text the word -> Veefriends to 1-212-931-5731 to stay up 😊 I am super humbled by this and can’t wait for this set to drop on June 10th in all your local Card stores!
FIRST LOOK: Topps Chrome VeeFriends is BACK for 2026! We can’t wait to show you more of the epic surprises in store… 👀

Send this to every college graduate in your world 🌍… if they understand the upside of this next 5 years and realize the options and the circumstances that make this the greatest “era” ever for them . This can change their life. If this video I shot years ago changed your life … share the story to inspire … cause they often don’t believe me :) ❤️❤️❤️🤍 #graduation #motivation #perspective #garyvee

caption_text:
Someone came up to me at this event in the video and asked me why they always quit ventures and ideas and businesses they start …
It’s easy … they are JUST Chasing just the money 💰 ..when you chase it but also love your day to day grind of chasing it cause you love ❤️ the business or venture you started it become achievable .. when it’s just the cash … it’s always gonna end up bad

#garyvee #passion #love

Once you’re good with “you” you’re good with life. 

#garyvee #beyou #mindset

It’s that time of year 👩🏽‍🎓 … send this talk to someone who needs it ❤️‼️

#garyvee #graduation #graduationspeech
